ParticipantSlot.title: Participant Slot
ParticipantSlot.description: Represents an assigned slot for a participant inside a meeting room

phoneNumber.description: The verified phone number of the slot occupant

name.description: The display name of the speaker

isMuted.description: Whether the speaker is currently muted

cameraOn.description: Whether the speaker's camera is enabled

isJoined.description: Whether the speaker has joined the live meeting room

Meeting.title: Meeting
Meeting.description: Represents a networking session with timed mic spotlights

description.description: Topic or summary of the session

time.description: Scheduled start date-time in ISO 8601 string or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm format

openDiscussionDuration.description: Open mic session duration in seconds

currentSpeakerSlot.description: Active speaker slot sequence (0 = warmup, 1-20 = speaker, 21 = discussion, 22 = completed)

speakerTurnStartedAt.description: Timestamp when the active speaker turn started

openDiscussionStartedAt.description: Timestamp when open discussion segment started

registeredNumbers.description: Whitelist of verified participant phone numbers

slots.description: A map of registered slots keyed by slotIndex

SiteSettings.title: Site Settings
SiteSettings.description: Global settings for the application marketing layout

aboutText.description: Introductory markdown text explaining the NEWOM format

site_settings/global.description: Global settings document for the app
